provider_source.source_of_truth_boundary: AOF agent session is summarized runtime evidence, not raw provider transcript truth.

event_summaries.summary: Heartbeat requested v9.2 release advancement with AOF runtime.
Generated production-boundary candidate and audit evidence.
AOF runtime selected v9.2 as a bounded pre-production provider boundary release, not a live execution release.
Runtime commands wrote provider boundary, product value, visibility, and release audit artifacts.
Provider production boundary audit and product value evidence audit passed for TASK-112.
Production execution remains blocked because v9.2 only proves candidate boundary readiness.
Stop if any claim authorizes live provider execution before a later controlled execution release.

risk_candidates: Pre-production boundary may be mistaken for production safety.
decision_candidates: Keep production execution unauthorized until v9.3+ controlled execution proof.

redaction_boundary: No secrets or provider credentials were accessed or exported.
release_ready_boundary: Release readiness is structural/runtime only; production safety remains not proven.
not_proven: Session export does not prove semantic correctness, production safety, or market value.
